page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m1.2xlarge is an x86_64 server instance powered by an Intel Xeon processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs, with 1.0 thread per core. The memory configuration consists of 8.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 1.0 GB per core ratio. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates average performance across most standard compute and memory operations. The instance achieves a Geekbench single-core score of 1397.0 and a multi-core score of 5272.0, alongside a Passmark CPU score of 10428.01. Memory bandwidth is measured at 424.69 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 59.61 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. While it handles small-scale language model inference efficiently, performance drops significantly on larger models, with the 7B model yielding a weak 7.76 tokens/sec for text generation.

Given its dedicated CPU cores but highly constrained memory capacity of 1.0 GB per core, this instance offers a compute-heavy profile with low memory density. This makes it a cost-efficient choice for CPU-bound tasks that do not require large memory footprints, such as static web serving, software compilation, and basic text or image processing. It is less suitable for memory-intensive databases or large-scale machine learning workloads due to the lack of local storage, GPUs, and high-capacity RAM.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m1.2xlarge is an x86_64 compute-focused instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores (8 vCPUs) running at 2.5 GHz, paired with 8.0 GB of RAM. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this server does not include local storage or GPU hardware, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Benchmark results show average performance, with a Passmark CPU score of 10428.01 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 5272.0. Memory bandwidth reaches 59.61 GB/sec for uncached large blocks, while static web serving throughput averages 9.4 GB/sec. Due to its low memory-to-CPU ratio of 1.0 GB per core, this instance is best suited for compute-bound workloads with small memory footprints, such as software compilation, static web serving, and lightweight text or image processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u1-c1m1.2xlarge is an x86_64 server with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering average compute performance for memory-light workloads.

tagline: A dedicated eight-core x86_64 compute instance with low memory density, optimized for lightweight processing and static web serving.
